page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.re8.180xlarge is a memory-optimized virtual machine instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 720 dedicated physical cores on the x86_64 architecture, utilizing Intel Xeon 8490H processors running at a base clock speed of 1.9 GHz. With a 1.0 thread-per-core configuration, each of the 720 vCPUs maps directly to a physical core, ensuring dedicated compute allocation without hyper-threading.

The instance is equipped with 12288.0 GB of system memory, yielding a high resource density of approximately 17.07 GB of RAM per core. It does not include local storage or integrated GPU hardware. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 192 Gbps, facilitating high-throughput data transfers for distributed environments.

Given the massive memory capacity and dedicated core allocation, this instance is designed for large-scale in-memory databases, enterprise resource planning systems, and heavy memory-bound analytical workloads. The absence of local storage requires reliance on external network-attached storage, which is supported by the high-capacity network interface.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.re8.180xlarge is a memory-optimized virtual machine instance designed for massive enterprise workloads. Running on the KVM hypervisor, it features 720 dedicated physical cores powered by Intel Xeon 8490H processors at 1.9 GHz, utilizing an x86_64 architecture with a single thread per core. The instance provides 12288.0 GB of RAM, translating to 17.07 GB of memory per core, making it highly suitable for memory-intensive applications. It does not include local storage or GPU accelerators, relying instead on a 192 Gbps baseline network bandwidth to connect to external storage systems and handle high-throughput data transfers. This hardware profile is optimized for large-scale in-memory databases, complex data analytics, and enterprise-grade applications requiring substantial memory footprints and dedicated compute resources.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.re8.180xlarge is a memory-optimized instance featuring 720 dedicated Intel Xeon 8490H cores, 12288 GB of RAM, and a 192 Gbps network interface for massive in-memory workloads.

tagline: An ultra-high-capacity memory-optimized instance featuring 720 dedicated physical cores and twelve terabytes of RAM for massive in-memory enterprise workloads.
bullet_points: 720 dedicated physical Intel Xeon 8490H cores with no hyper-threading
12288 GB of system memory providing 17.07 GB of RAM per core
192 Gbps baseline network bandwidth for high-throughput data transfer
No local storage or GPU hardware included
Optimized for large-scale in-memory databases and enterprise ERP systems
